column8: Percy Spencer liked chocolate a lot. In the morning, before_________to work, he made sure he had a bar of chocolate with him to eat later on in the day. (GO)
column9: When he got to work, he put on__________white coat and walked into the laboratory. He had no idea he was about to change the world forever. (HE)
column10: It was 1945, and Percey___________important scientific experiments with radar. (DO)
column11: Suddenly, when he put his hand in his pocket, he felt sticky, liquid chocolate. He realised that the radar_________the chocolate bar somehow. (MELT)
column12: We'll never know exactly how Percy____________, but he was probably excited by what had happened and disappointed that he wouldn't be able to eat his bar of chocolate. (FEEL)
column13: Percy's discovery soon____________to the invention of the microwave oven. (LEAD)
column14: Percy built the___________oven, and then he and his colleagues tried it out to see if it worked. (ONE)
column15: They cooked some popcorn, which cooked very quickly. They__________it was a big success. (THINK)
column16: Then they tried cooking an egg, but it wasn't so successful. The egg exploded all over the face of one of the_________working with Percy! (MAN)
